allow: PowerShell(Set-Location "C:\\Empresa\\Projetos\\Mobile Saude - git"; $out = & cmd /c "npm install 2>&1"; $out | Select-Object -Last 15 | Out-String; "EXITCODE=$LASTEXITCODE")

PowerShell(Set-Location "C:\\Empresa\\Projetos\\Mobile Saude - git"; Remove-Item src\\components\\HelloWorld.vue, src\\assets\\hero.png -Force; if\(-not \(Get-ChildItem src\\components\)\){ Remove-Item src\\components -Force }; "cleaned")
